text:
* Buganini (buganini@gmail.com) wrote:
 
 > -post-patch:
 > -       @${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/local|${LOCALBASE}|g' ${WRKSRC}/gbsdconv
 > -
 > I'm also working on new release recently :D
 
 Because PREFIX is set via MAKE_ENV, and its value in Makefile is not
 used.
